# MuleSoft X12 EDI Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.18) of X12 EDI Connector documentation.
> See [X12 EDI Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the X12 EDI Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/index.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 Batch Outbound X12 Messages](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-batching.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 Schema and Trading Partner Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-config-topics.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 Control Numbers](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-control-numbers.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-examples.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 HIPAA](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-hipaa.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-reference.md)
- [Use Anypoint Studio to Configure X12 EDI Connector 2.18](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-studio.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 - Understanding the EDI Schema Language](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-understand-edi-schema.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 - Message Structure Hierarchy](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-x12-edi-message-structure-hierarchy.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [X12 EDI Connector 2.18 - EDI Schema Language Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/x12-edi-connector/latest/x12-edi-schema-language-reference.md)
